note: These define how the 3D video background responds to page scroll. Select one ID per site in Stage 1.

behaviors.label: Direct Scrub — Linear
behaviors.description: Scroll position directly controls video playback time. 1:1 mapping. Video plays frame-by-frame as user scrolls.
behaviors.css_note: Set video playbackRate = 0; control via currentTime only

behaviors.label: Eased Scrub — Cinematic
behaviors.description: Scroll drives video time but with lerp smoothing. Video lags slightly behind scroll for cinematic feel.
behaviors.implementation: targetTime = scroll%; currentTime += (targetTime - currentTime) * 0.08 per frame

behaviors.label: Section Trigger — Video Chapters
behaviors.description: Video has defined time ranges per section. As user scrolls into a section, video jumps/plays that range and loops.
behaviors.implementation: IntersectionObserver per section; on enter play videoStart[section] → videoEnd[section], loop

behaviors.label: Ambient Loop — Scroll-Triggered Opacity
behaviors.description: Video plays in a continuous loop at all times. Scroll only affects video opacity/blur. Different sections show video more or less.
behaviors.implementation: video.play(); loop=true; opacity = map(scrollY, sectionStart, sectionEnd, 0.2, 0.8)

behaviors.label: Video Position Parallax
behaviors.description: Video plays looped but the video element itself shifts position (translateY) on scroll, creating parallax depth.

behaviors.label: Reverse Scrub on Up-Scroll
behaviors.description: Video plays forward on scroll-down, plays in reverse on scroll-up. Highly interactive feel.
behaviors.implementation: Store scroll direction; if direction=up, playbackRate=-1; else playbackRate=1
best_for: brands that want to stand out
behaviors.note: Not all browsers support negative playbackRate — use currentTime scrub instead

behaviors.label: Blend Mode — Multiply / Screen
behaviors.description: Video uses CSS mix-blend-mode: multiply or screen to blend with background color. Creates duotone/color treatment.
behaviors.implementation: video { mix-blend-mode: multiply; } body background = accent color
avoid_if: realistic video that should look natural

behaviors.label: Scroll-Driven Mask Reveal
behaviors.description: Video is masked (hidden) initially. Scroll reveals the video through a growing clip-path mask.
behaviors.implementation: clip-path grows from center or from section top based on scrollY progress
